TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ye-hanke-al-wen, title = Ye-hanke-al-wen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ye-hanke-al-wen} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-han.ke-al-wen "kamu nu Ba, Jean Calvin, Ba a kamu pangiha, ( í…ĎŐÉ kalv…õŐÉ), 1509 a mihca 7a bulad 10 a demiad-1564 a mihca 5 a bulad 27 a demiad" unu Ba-kow singanganay a kiwkay nu pisumad, sen-sye-cya, baluhayay kahenulan sakaput-misumad tu kiwkay "anucaay ngangan hanminukas tu nu kiwkiy, Ke-al-wennay" nu palekalay. ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ŚĖÄÁąĺśĖá(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Jean Calvin,ś≥ēŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:( í…ĎŐÉ kalv…õŐÉ)Ôľõ1509ŚĻī7śúą10śó•‚ÄĒ1564ŚĻī5śúą27śó•) . nilaculan nilecun atu masakapah a mihcaan ke-al-wen lecuh i Ba-kowPa-li nuamisan cayay ka bataday a Wa-ce-kuwan Nu-wa-yung. u mibutingay ku baki, wama ci Ze-la-al "Gerard Calvin" u maylay mademelay, pakala tiniay kiwkay nu mikeliday nu mikiluay a kawawwinw ci Zang-na "Jeanne Lefranc" mikilul tu tin-si-kiw. u matatungusay sitineng malakapah,kasenengan nu tataynaadidi' henay ciniza i Ke-al-wen, hina kelid cinizaan muculil i niyazu'ay a zazan, milungc, caay ka lemed matabal mapatay. Ke-al-wen a wama nacaay yaca ka mayilayay ku uzip, mangaleb sakay tatulu tatamaan a wawa maydih asiput, micudad tu kapahay a nipasubana' ku heni, sakay tataynaan a wawa maydih malu mikawaway lalabu nu luma' ku heni. Ke-al-wen a wama mikawaw i kiwkay, u kasikazan aca nu kaktian a tademaw amin, tini a niyazu'an tada malalacalay tu situngusay kakitaan a tademaw, uyni sakay tatamaan a wawa niza, u micidekay ku kalalitemuh. . picudadan tu talakaway masakapahnay ci Ke-al-wen u tensikiw, henasikaz ciniza, caay ka ngelu' minanam, misaadidi' tu kaen, caay ka palawpe, milasul amala sinpu,. 1523 a mihcaan, uyza ci Ke-al-wen a niyazu' Low-yang madengadeng tu malalid a imelang, mikilul mapulung ci Mung-te-mu-cyaan tayza i Pa-li, , Ke-al-wen micumud tu Coll√®ge de la Marche talakaway a cacudadan, teked a minana, tu La-tin-win-sye, pakala tu tada kakaydihan nu saydanka ci Ma-ti-lan.ke-al-ti-ye "Mathurin Cordier" i pasubana' niza minanam ahicaen misulit ku ulic. Pakala tu wi-sye-se zikuz, ci Ke-al-wen pasayza i Coll√®ge de Montaigu talakaway a cacudadan, teked a minanam tu ce-sye atu lun-li-sye, uyni pinanam maedap ciniza tu sitesekay a nizateng, sakay zikuz pisasukamu caay ka tesek ku piedap. ŚĖÄÁąĺśĖáťÄ≤ŚÖ•Coll√®ge de la Marche ¬∑ÁßĎÁąĺŤŅ™ŤÄ∂(Mathurin Cordier) Coll√®ge de MontaiguŚ§ßŚ≠ł, . 156 a mihcaan Ke-al-wen a wama mizateng mikawaw tu ninkusi taneng a kakitaan ku tademaw, maydih miales ciniza tu sen-sye teked minanam tu hulic, ci Ke-al-wen matalaw a mikaai tu nipatulun, micumud tu Aw-al-lyang talakawaay a cacudadan teked minanam tu hulic, i cacay nipahulic tu ninkusi a caculculan mipasubana', caay ka tenes kapah ku nipicudada, tuwaca sipud ku pasubanay, u mikutayay pasubana' aca ci Ke-al-wen. 1531 a mihcaan, maniyul micumud i Pu-al-ze talakaway a cacudadan "University of Bourges" lecad a mihcaan, mapatay ku wama ni Ke-al-win. Ke-al-win I Pow-ci-s talakawaway a cacudadan minanam tu cacay pangkiw a mihcaan, laced a demiadan mananam tu niza ku S-la-wen, sakay cinizaan zikuz a demiad migikuw tu baluhay a sesiw ayadah ku katineng, ku-tyenwen-sye u kanamuhan ni Ke-al-wen, migingkiway tu hulic mapahabay tu ku sakaput a tineng ni Ke-al-wen. 1532 a mihcaan Ke-al-wen tahkal ku saayaway nipabelinan a cudad-sin-ni-cye hamin a cacudadan "Annaeus Seneca,4 BC‚ÄďAD 65" teban aazihan "damsayay" a nipanelin, uyni a cudad pawacay tu 55 a tademawan nisulitan tu La-tin-wen misulit atu 22 a tademawan misulitan nu Si-la-wen, uyni cudad ni Ke-al-wen a ngangan mapasiwkuy ku matinengay a kitakitay. nika tawya uyni a cudad caay ku kanamuhan nu syakay, zumamigikiway ahicasa uyni a cudad u sakay paculian nu kiwkay milunguc tu tizaay a c en-hu. Anu mahicahica, uyni a cudad zikuz tahkal ku nipabelinan nu Ke-al-wen tu "sesiw" a kawaw, makutkut tu ku uyaanay a imi, zikuz musakamu tu nipatubeli. masakapah henay a mihcaan ci Ke-al-wen, Ma-tin.Lu-te a kiwkay misumad caay henay mapatinak i niyazzu' ni Ke-al-wen, kyu u cacayay ku baludu' a mikilul tu tensikiw, nika 1523 a mihcaan tayni i Pa-li zikuz, malingatu tu ciniza micudad tu mikuliniway tayza I Ba-kow a Ma-tin.Lu-te a nisulitan, pacumud han nuzuma nisumadan tu unnud nu baluhay a nizateng. hakay namaazih ku saayaway nu mikilulay tu kiwkay a mapatay ci Pow-wa-na "Pauvanne" matiduh i pipatayan, anucaay maazih ku nu Ba-kow kakitaan ci P0w-cin "Berquin" zayhaan pabelin tu nisulitan ni Lu-te a mabakah ku uzip, masumad ku kiwkay mala u talakaway cacudadanay u sasakamuen atu tatengilan a sasakamuan. 1564 a mihcian, kek-al-win pihceng ku sulalisan, malalisan atu siizang ku huhu, mangaleb da'cus ku uzip, sazikuzay I 5 bulad 27 a demiad mapatay i ay-wa. 1564ŚĻī, malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == j…ô-ńßan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn "kamu nu ba, *…ôan ¶ar~…ĺ*in, ba a kamu paŇčińßa, (*** kar~…ĺ***), **** a mińß ¶a *a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" unu ba-kow siŇčaŇčanaj a kiwkaj nu pisumad, s…ôn-sj…ô- ¶ja, bar~…ĺuńßajaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan sakaput-misumad tu kiwkaj "anu ¶aaj ŇčaŇčan ńßanminukas tu nu kiwkij, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ônnaj" nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj. ******(**:*…ôan ¶ar~…ĺ*in,****:(*** kar~…ĺ***)**********************) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nir~…ĺ…ô ¶un atu masakapańß a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ba-kowpa-r~…ĺi nuamisan ¶ajaj ka batadaj a wa- ¶…ô-kuwan nu-wa-juŇč. u mibutiŇčaj ku baki, wama ¶i z…ô-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ "g…ôrard ¶ar~…ĺ*in" u majr~…ĺaj mad…ôm…ôr~…ĺaj, pakar~…ĺa tiniaj kiwkaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu mikir~…ĺuaj a kawawwinw ¶i zaŇč-na "*…ôann…ô r~…ĺ…ôfran ¶" mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tin-si-kiw. u matatuŇčusaj sitin…ôŇč mar~…ĺakapańß,kas…ôn…ôŇčan nu tatajnaadidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ¶iniza i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, ńßina k…ôr~…ĺid ¶inizaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i nijazu Ē~ °aj a zazan, mir~…ĺuŇč ¶, ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd matabar~…ĺ mapataj. k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a wama na ¶aaj ja ¶a ka majir~…ĺajaj ku uzip, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb sakaj tatur~…ĺu tatamaan a wawa majdińß asiput, mi ¶udad tu kapańßaj a nipasubana Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôni, sakaj tatajnaan a wawa majdińß mar~…ĺu mikawawaj r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôni. k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a wama mikawaw i kiwkaj, u kasikazan a ¶a nu kaktian a tad…ômaw amin, tini a nijazu Ē~ °an tada mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺaj tu situŇčusaj kakitaan a tad…ômaw, ujni sakaj tatamaan a wawa niza, u mi ¶id…ôkaj ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß. . pi ¶udadan tu tar~…ĺakawaj masakapańßnaj ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn u t…ônsikiw, ńß…ônasikaz ¶iniza, ¶aaj ka Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° minanam, misaadidi Ē~ ° tu ka…ôn, ¶aaj ka par~…ĺawp…ô, mir~…ĺasur~…ĺ amar~…ĺa sinpu,. **** a mińß ¶aan, ujza ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺow-jaŇč mad…ôŇčad…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ mapur~…ĺuŇč ¶i muŇč-t…ô-mu- ¶jaan tajza i pa-r~…ĺi, , k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn mi ¶umud tu ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô r~…ĺa mar ¶ńß…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, t…ôk…ôd a minana, tu r~…ĺa-tin-win-sj…ô, pakar~…ĺa tu tada kakajdińßan nu sajdanka ¶i ma-ti-r~…ĺan.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-ti-j…ô "matńßurin ¶ordi…ôr" i pasubana Ē~ ° niza minanam ańßi ¶a…ôn misur~…ĺit ku ur~…ĺi ¶. pakar~…ĺa tu wi-sj…ô-s…ô zikuz, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn pasajza i ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô montaigu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, t…ôk…ôd a minanam tu ¶…ô-sj…ô atu r~…ĺun-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, ujni pinanam ma…ôdap ¶iniza tu sit…ôs…ôkaj a nizat…ôŇč, sakaj zikuz pisasukamu ¶aaj ka t…ôs…ôk ku pi…ôdap. ***** ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô r~…ĺa mar ¶ńß…ô *****(matńßurin ¶ordi…ôr) ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô montaigu**, . *** a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a wama mizat…ôŇč mikawaw tu ninkusi tan…ôŇč a kakitaan ku tad…ômaw, majdińß miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶iniza tu s…ôn-sj…ô t…ôk…ôd minanam tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn matar~…ĺaw a mikaai tu nipatur~…ĺun, mi ¶umud tu aw-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺjaŇč tar~…ĺakawaaj a ¶a ¶udadan t…ôk…ôd minanam tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, i ¶a ¶aj nipańßur~…ĺi ¶ tu ninkusi a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan mipasubana Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs kapańß ku nipi ¶udada, tuwa ¶a sipud ku pasubanaj, u mikutajaj pasubana Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan, manijur~…ĺ mi ¶umud i pu-ar~…ĺ-z…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan "uni*…ôrsitj of bourg…ôs" r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan, mapataj ku wama ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-win. k…ô-ar~…ĺ-win i pow- ¶i-s tar~…ĺakawawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu ¶a ¶aj paŇčkiw a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺa ¶…ôd a d…ômiadan mananam tu niza ku s-r~…ĺa-w…ôn, sakaj ¶inizaan zikuz a d…ômiad migikuw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a s…ôsiw ajadańß ku katin…ôŇč, ku-tj…ônw…ôn-sj…ô u kanamuńßan ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, migiŇčkiwaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ mapańßabaj tu ku sakaput a tin…ôŇč ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn tańßkar~…ĺ ku saajawaj nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a ¶udad-sin-ni- ¶j…ô ńßamin a ¶a ¶udadan "anna…ôus s…ôn…ô ¶a,* b ¶*ad **" t…ôban aazińßan "damsajaj" a nipan…ôr~…ĺin, ujni a ¶udad pawa ¶aj tu ** a tad…ômawan nisur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺa-tin-w…ôn misur~…ĺit atu ** a tad…ômawan misur~…ĺitan nu si-r~…ĺa-w…ôn, ujni ¶udad ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan mapasiwkuj ku matin…ôŇčaj a kitakitaj. nika tawja ujni a ¶udad ¶aaj ku kanamuńßan nu sjakaj, zumamigikiwaj ańßi ¶asa ujni a ¶udad u sakaj pa ¶ur~…ĺian nu kiwkaj mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu tizaaj a ¶ …ôn-ńßu. anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, ujni a ¶udad zikuz tańßkar~…ĺ ku nipab…ôr~…ĺinan nu k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn tu "s…ôsiw" a kawaw, makutkut tu ku ujaanaj a imi, zikuz musakamu tu nipatub…ôr~…ĺi. masakapańß ńß…ônaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, ma-tin.r~…ĺu-t…ô a kiwkaj misumad ¶aaj ńß…ônaj mapatinak i nijazzu Ē~ ° ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, kju u ¶a ¶ajaj ku bar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu t…ônsikiw, nika **** a mińß ¶aan tajni i pa-r~…ĺi zikuz, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ¶iniza mi ¶udad tu mikur~…ĺiniwaj tajza i ba-kow a ma-tin.r~…ĺu-t…ô a nisur~…ĺitan, pa ¶umud ńßan nuzuma nisumadan tu unnud nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nizat…ôŇč. ńßakaj namaazińß ku saajawaj nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu kiwkaj a mapataj ¶i pow-wa-na "pau*ann…ô" matiduńß i pipatajan, anu ¶aaj maazińß ku nu ba-kow kakitaan ¶i p*w- ¶in "b…ôr*uin" zajńßaan pab…ôr~…ĺin tu nisur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺu-t…ô a mabakańß ku uzip, masumad ku kiwkaj mar~…ĺa u tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadanaj u sasakamu…ôn atu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a sasakamuan. **** a mińß ¶ian, k…ôk-ar~…ĺ-win pińß ¶…ôŇč ku sur~…ĺar~…ĺisan, mar~…ĺar~…ĺisan atu siizaŇč ku ńßuńßu, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb da Ē~ ° ¶us ku uzip, sazikuzaj i * bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapataj i aj-wa. *****, mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-han.ke-al-wen "kamu nu Ba, Jean Calvin, Ba a kamu pangiha, ( í…ĎŐÉ kalv…õŐÉ), 1509 a mihca 7a bulad 10 a demiad-1564 a mihca 5 a bulad 27 a demiad" unu Ba-kow singanganay a kiwkay nu pisumad, sen-sye-cya, baluhayay kahenulan sakaput-misumad tu kiwkay "anucaay ngangan hanminukas tu nu kiwkiy, Ke-al-wennay" nu palekalay. ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ŚĖÄÁąĺśĖá(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Jean Calvin,ś≥ēŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:( í…ĎŐÉ kalv…õŐÉ)Ôľõ1509ŚĻī7śúą10śó•‚ÄĒ1564ŚĻī5śúą27śó•) . nilaculan nilecun atu masakapah a mihcaan ke-al-wen lecuh i Ba-kowPa-li nuamisan cayay ka bataday a Wa-ce-kuwan Nu-wa-yung. u mibutingay ku baki, wama ci Ze-la-al "Gerard Calvin" u maylay mademelay, pakala tiniay kiwkay nu mikeliday nu mikiluay a kawawwinw ci Zang-na "Jeanne Lefranc" mikilul tu tin-si-kiw. u matatungusay sitineng malakapah,kasenengan nu tataynaadidi' henay ciniza i Ke-al-wen, hina kelid cinizaan muculil i niyazu'ay a zazan, milungc, caay ka lemed matabal mapatay. Ke-al-wen a wama nacaay yaca ka mayilayay ku uzip, mangaleb sakay tatulu tatamaan a wawa maydih asiput, micudad tu kapahay a nipasubana' ku heni, sakay tataynaan a wawa maydih malu mikawaway lalabu nu luma' ku heni. Ke-al-wen a wama mikawaw i kiwkay, u kasikazan aca nu kaktian a tademaw amin, tini a niyazu'an tada malalacalay tu situngusay kakitaan a tademaw, uyni sakay tatamaan a wawa niza, u micidekay ku kalalitemuh. . picudadan tu talakaway masakapahnay ci Ke-al-wen u tensikiw, henasikaz ciniza, caay ka ngelu' minanam, misaadidi' tu kaen, caay ka palawpe, milasul amala sinpu,. 1523 a mihcaan, uyza ci Ke-al-wen a niyazu' Low-yang madengadeng tu malalid a imelang, mikilul mapulung ci Mung-te-mu-cyaan tayza i Pa-li, , Ke-al-wen micumud tu Coll√®ge de la Marche talakaway a cacudadan, teked a minana, tu La-tin-win-sye, pakala tu tada kakaydihan nu saydanka ci Ma-ti-lan.ke-al-ti-ye "Mathurin Cordier" i pasubana' niza minanam ahicaen misulit ku ulic. Pakala tu wi-sye-se zikuz, ci Ke-al-wen pasayza i Coll√®ge de Montaigu talakaway a cacudadan, teked a minanam tu ce-sye atu lun-li-sye, uyni pinanam maedap ciniza tu sitesekay a nizateng, sakay zikuz pisasukamu caay ka tesek ku piedap. ŚĖÄÁąĺśĖáťÄ≤ŚÖ•Coll√®ge de la Marche ¬∑ÁßĎÁąĺŤŅ™ŤÄ∂(Mathurin Cordier) Coll√®ge de MontaiguŚ§ßŚ≠ł, . 156 a mihcaan Ke-al-wen a wama mizateng mikawaw tu ninkusi taneng a kakitaan ku tademaw, maydih miales ciniza tu sen-sye teked minanam tu hulic, ci Ke-al-wen matalaw a mikaai tu nipatulun, micumud tu Aw-al-lyang talakawaay a cacudadan teked minanam tu hulic, i cacay nipahulic tu ninkusi a caculculan mipasubana', caay ka tenes kapah ku nipicudada, tuwaca sipud ku pasubanay, u mikutayay pasubana' aca ci Ke-al-wen. 1531 a mihcaan, maniyul micumud i Pu-al-ze talakaway a cacudadan "University of Bourges" lecad a mihcaan, mapatay ku wama ni Ke-al-win. Ke-al-win I Pow-ci-s talakawaway a cacudadan minanam tu cacay pangkiw a mihcaan, laced a demiadan mananam tu niza ku S-la-wen, sakay cinizaan zikuz a demiad migikuw tu baluhay a sesiw ayadah ku katineng, ku-tyenwen-sye u kanamuhan ni Ke-al-wen, migingkiway tu hulic mapahabay tu ku sakaput a tineng ni Ke-al-wen. 1532 a mihcaan Ke-al-wen tahkal ku saayaway nipabelinan a cudad-sin-ni-cye hamin a cacudadan "Annaeus Seneca,4 BC‚ÄďAD 65" teban aazihan "damsayay" a nipanelin, uyni a cudad pawacay tu 55 a tademawan nisulitan tu La-tin-wen misulit atu 22 a tademawan misulitan nu Si-la-wen, uyni cudad ni Ke-al-wen a ngangan mapasiwkuy ku matinengay a kitakitay. nika tawya uyni a cudad caay ku kanamuhan nu syakay, zumamigikiway ahicasa uyni a cudad u sakay paculian nu kiwkay milunguc tu tizaay a c en-hu. Anu mahicahica, uyni a cudad zikuz tahkal ku nipabelinan nu Ke-al-wen tu "sesiw" a kawaw, makutkut tu ku uyaanay a imi, zikuz musakamu tu nipatubeli. masakapah henay a mihcaan ci Ke-al-wen, Ma-tin.Lu-te a kiwkay misumad caay henay mapatinak i niyazzu' ni Ke-al-wen, kyu u cacayay ku baludu' a mikilul tu tensikiw, nika 1523 a mihcaan tayni i Pa-li zikuz, malingatu tu ciniza micudad tu mikuliniway tayza I Ba-kow a Ma-tin.Lu-te a nisulitan, pacumud han nuzuma nisumadan tu unnud nu baluhay a nizateng. hakay namaazih ku saayaway nu mikilulay tu kiwkay a mapatay ci Pow-wa-na "Pauvanne" matiduh i pipatayan, anucaay maazih ku nu Ba-kow kakitaan ci P0w-cin "Berquin" zayhaan pabelin tu nisulitan ni Lu-te a mabakah ku uzip, masumad ku kiwkay mala u talakaway cacudadanay u sasakamuen atu tatengilan a sasakamuan. 1564 a mihcian, kek-al-win pihceng ku sulalisan, malalisan atu siizang ku huhu, mangaleb da'cus ku uzip, sazikuzay I 5 bulad 27 a demiad mapatay i ay-wa. 1564ŚĻī, malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

unu ba-kow siŇčaŇčanaj a kiwkaj nu pisumad, s…ôn-sj…ô- ¶ja, bar~…ĺuńßajaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan sakaput-misumad tu kiwkaj "anu ¶aaj ŇčaŇčan ńßanminukas tu nu kiwkij, k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ônnaj" nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj. ******(**:*…ôan ¶ar~…ĺ*in,****:(*** kar~…ĺ***)**********************) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nir~…ĺ…ô ¶un atu masakapańß a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ba-kowpa-r~…ĺi nuamisan ¶ajaj ka batadaj a ¶ordi…ôr) ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ*g…ô d…ô montaigu**, . *** a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a wama mizat…ôŇč mikawaw tu ninkusi tan…ôŇč a kakitaan ku tad…ômaw, majdińß miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶iniza tu s…ôn-sj…ô t…ôk…ôd minanam tu pu-ar~…ĺ-z…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan "uni*…ôrsitj of bourg…ôs" r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan, mapataj ku wama ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-win. k…ô-ar~…ĺ-win i pow- ¶i-s tar~…ĺakawawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu ¶a ¶aj k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, migiŇčkiwaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ mapańßabaj tu ku sakaput a tin…ôŇč ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn tańßkar~…ĺ ku saajawaj nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a ¶udad-sin-ni- ¶j…ô ńßamin a ¶a ¶udadan "anna…ôus s…ôn…ô ¶a,* b ¶*ad **" t…ôban aazińßan "damsajaj" a nipan…ôr~…ĺin, ujni a ¶udad pawa ¶aj tu ** a tad…ômawan nisur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺa-tin-w…ôn misur~…ĺit atu ** a tad…ômawan misur~…ĺitan nu si-r~…ĺa-w…ôn, ujni ¶udad ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan mapasiwkuj ku matin…ôŇčaj a kitakitaj. nika tawja ujni a ¶udad ¶aaj ku kanamuńßan nu sjakaj, zumamigikiwaj ańßi ¶asa ujni a ¶udad u sakaj pa ¶ur~…ĺian nu kiwkaj mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu tizaaj a ¶ …ôn-ńßu. anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, ujni a ¶udad zikuz tańßkar~…ĺ ku nipab…ôr~…ĺinan nu k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn tu "s…ôsiw" a kawaw, makutkut tu ku ujaanaj a imi, zikuz musakamu tu nipatub…ôr~…ĺi. masakapańß ńß…ônaj a mińß ¶aan ¶i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, ma-tin.r~…ĺu-t…ô a kiwkaj misumad ¶aaj ńß…ônaj mapatinak i nijazzu Ē~ ° ni k…ô-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, kju u ¶a ¶ajaj ku bar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu t…ônsikiw, nika **** a mińß ¶aan tajni i pa-r~…ĺi zikuz, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ¶iniza mi ¶udad tu mikur~…ĺiniwaj tajza i ba-kow a ma-tin.r~…ĺu-t…ô a nisur~…ĺitan, pa ¶umud ńßan nuzuma nisumadan tu unnud nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nizat…ôŇč. ńßakaj namaazińß ku saajawaj nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu kiwkaj a mapataj ¶i pow-wa-na "pau*ann…ô" matiduńß i pipatajan, anu ¶aaj maazińß ku nu ba-kow kakitaan
